claims.quote: Must be at least 16 years old at time of the application
claims.claimText: General volunteer program requires applicants to be at least 16 years old; no mention of medical students, IMGs, or observership.
claims.tierAssignmentRationale: Generic hospital volunteer page; eligibility (age 16+) and duties (non-medical comfort) do not reference medical students, IMGs, premed clinical experience, or observership-equivalent service.
claims.limitations: No medical-student or IMG audience stated; not USCE-relevant.

claims.quote: Our volunteers provide non-medical comfort and care to patients and assist departments.
claims.claimText: Page explicitly characterizes volunteer role as non-medical, which excludes observership/clinical-experience activity.
claims.tierAssignmentRationale: Volunteer scope is explicitly non-medical; does not satisfy USCE/observership criteria.

unresolveds: Volunteer page does not state whether medical students, premed students, or IMGs may volunteer in clinical-observation capacity; treated as non-USCE.
recommendedA2Focus: Locate TGH visiting-student/observership/elective pages (likely under Education or USF Morsani affiliation) since this volunteer page is non-medical.

claims.quote: We have a variety of opportunities to explore across all areas of patient care from clinical openings and research to administration and operations.
claims.claimText: TGH offers career opportunities across clinical, research, administration, and operations.
claims.tierAssignmentRationale: General careers portal describing job opportunities, including clinical and corporate roles — Tier 3 career content.

claims.claimText: Talent Acquisition contact phone number provided.
claims.tierAssignmentRationale: Talent Acquisition contact for careers — Tier 3 career resource.

claims.quote: Medical insuranceDental insuranceVision insuranceFlexible spending accountsWellness programsLife insuranceShort- and long-term disability insurance403(b) retirement savings planAccrued time off (ATO)Tuition programsOnsite daycareLactation rooms
claims.claimText: TGH benefits include medical, dental, vision, life, short- and long-term disability insurance, 403(b), ATO, tuition, daycare.
claims.tierAssignmentRationale: Employee benefits package detail — Tier 3 career/benefits content.

claims.quote: If an offer is made, relocation assistance may be available for candidates in certain locations who are offered certain positions.
claims.claimText: Relocation assistance may be available for select positions.
claims.tierAssignmentRationale: Relocation assistance is Tier 3 career/benefit content.

claims.quote: After TGH extends a conditional job offer to an applicant, the applicant must successfully complete:A drug screeningA background checkAn employment eligibility verification (proof of authorization to legally work in the United States)
claims.claimText: Post-offer requirements: drug screen, background check, employment eligibility verification (US work authorization).
claims.tierAssignmentRationale: Hiring/eligibility requirements for employment — Tier 3 career content. Notably requires US work authorization (relevant to visa-dependent physicians).

claims.quote: Abdominal Transplant FellowshipAcute & Critical Care OT Fellowship ProgramAcute Care PT Residency ProgramClinical Pastoral Education ProgramContinuing Medical EducationCouris Family Administrative Fellow ProgramGrand RoundsNeurologic PT Residency ProgramOTD Capstone ExperiencePharmacy Residency ProgramsSchool of Medical Laboratory ScienceSpeech-Language Pathology Clinical Fellowship Program
claims.claimText: Navigation lists educational programs including Abdominal Transplant Fellowship, OT/PT residencies/fellowships, pharmacy residencies, and CME.
claims.tierAssignmentRationale: Page navigation lists training/fellowship programs (Abdominal Transplant Fellowship etc.) — Tier 2 trainee programs.
claims.limitations: Listed in site navigation only; not detailed on this careers page.

claims.quote: We offer 12-week contract RN positions with a 36-hour per week schedule, a flat hourly rate, shift differentials and eligibility for benefits, such as health insurance and a 403(b) retirement savings plan.
claims.claimText: TGH offers 12-week contract RN positions with benefits eligibility.
claims.tierAssignmentRationale: Contract nursing positions — Tier 3 career content (nursing, not physician, but career-level employment).

claims.quote: Individuals who are interested in joining our team can explore our currently open positions and submit an online application at www.tgh.org/careers .
claims.tierAssignmentRationale: Application pathway for general employment — Tier 3.

claims.quote: Physician-to-Physician Observer Application Request at TGH Main
